task_summaries.task_scope: Measure concentration and entropy of Destination Port distribution conditioned on DDoS and non-DDoS classes using evidence e2 and e33.
Analyze diversity and spread of Destination Port usage within DDoS and non-DDoS classes to identify narrow or broad port targeting patterns.
Evaluate dependency and predictive leverage of Destination Port skew on class imbalance and potential overfitting risks.
Check for dataset collection or labeling biases affecting Destination Port distribution and their impact on class representation using evidence e2 and e33.
